summary: PDC v2 Fiches Harmonisation Testing Complete - All 6 features verified. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly. Fiche 6 shows 6 predefined axes strategiques (ARS 1000). Fiche 7 has new columns (sous_activites, execution, appui). Fiche 8 shows predefined categories (Investissement, Intrants, Main d'oeuvre). Step 3 summary auto-fills from Step 1 data (Identification, Menage, Exploitation).
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: AXES_STRATEGIQUES constant (lines 956-964) correctly defines 6 predefined axes for Fiche 6
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: renderFiche7 (lines 1182-1217) includes new columns sous_activites, execution, appui in DynamicTable
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: renderFiche8 (lines 1219-1280) includes predefined categories for Investissement, Intrants, Main d'oeuvre
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: getStep3Summary (lines 966-1003) extracts data from step1 for auto-fill
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: renderStep3Summary (lines 1005-1142) displays Identification, Menage, Exploitation sections
Backend pdc_v2_pdf.py: Fiche 7 PDF (lines 628-642) includes sous_activites, execution, appui columns
Backend pdc_v2.py: save_step3 (lines 380-401) correctly saves fiche7 with new fields
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PDC Bamba Ibrahim (69da80390d8a87a393fd1ede)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDC v2 Fiches 6, 7, 8 harmonisation fully tested. PDC Bamba Ibrahim (69da80390d8a87a393fd1ede) is in Step 3 with full step1 data. Fiche 6 shows 6 predefined axes when axes array is empty. Fiche 7 has new columns sous_activites, execution, appui. Fiche 8 shows predefined categories.
